title: Fantasy Chest
description: Requires EMF (Entity Model Features) or Optifine
body:
![Logo](https://i.imgur.com/zav1Bwo.png)


# ABOUT:

Fantasy Chest (a subsection of [Fantasy and Bettercraft](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fantasy-and-bettercraft)) improves upon vanilla Minecraft chests by adding a new, simple 3D model with a rustic/medieval.
Inspired by Jappa, but with my personal style, and FPS friendly.


# FEATURES:

* Requires EMF (Entity Model Features mod) or Optifine.
* 3D Chest and Trapped Chest.
* Rustic, Medieval, and Vanilla Style!!

I hope you like it. ❤

![IMPORTAT](https://i.imgur.com/EjFOwtq.png)
